key_dungeons.name: Hidden Warren
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Hidden Warren. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Coral Key from Hidden Warren
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.

game_log: Lady Revenna: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
Lady Revenna: The Hidden Warren holds a powerful artifact. A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.
Lady Revenna: Will you seek it out and bring it back?
Lady Revenna: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the Hidden Warren on your map. Be careful out there!
You descend into Hidden Warren - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
Stairs up! Press ESC to leave.
